name: John Doe
history: Spent about one year working on a project in Europe involving building a website and conducting interviews. Reports pride in the work and a wish to share the results. Past history of procrastination and anxiety. Uses strategies learned from a course and reminders to manage daily life.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must have a clear direction in life to be successful.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't have a clear path, I will fail.
coping_strategies: Uses reminders and strategies from a course to manage daily life. Engages in small projects like cooking to distract from negative thoughts.
situation: Facing ambiguity about life direction and choices, with many options to consider.
auto_thought: I don't know what I want to do with my life, and that means I'm failing.
behavior: Procrastinates and avoids making decisions about the future. Engages in activities like drumming and cooking to distract from worries.
